OTHER EVENTS      On December 20, 2006, The Clorox Company (Clorox) issued a press release announcing that it had entered into a definitive agreement (the Agreement) with Colgate-Palmolive Company (Colgate) to purchase Colgates bleach businesses in Canada, Colombia, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, Uruguay and Venezuela for an aggregate price of

Clorox Company (the "Company") exchanged various businesses with Henkel KgaA ("Henkel"), and, in January 2005, the Company announced the assignment of new management responsibilities, which was effective in January 2005 and resulted in the realignment of segments.
As previously announced, the Company became a limited partner in 1998 in an investment fund that invests in developed-market currencies.
Pro forma financial information reflecting the Transaction was set forth in the Form 8-K as an exhibit to the Form 8-K.
